# Pawsport (Silk Road Paws)

> Pawsport is an export service for premium Chinese dog breeds, hand-delivered
> worldwide. We help international buyers reserve healthy, well-documented purebred
> puppies bred in China — with live video viewing before purchase, full health and
> vaccination records, export paperwork, and professional escorted ("white-glove")
> delivery to the buyer's country. We specialize in rare and culturally Chinese
> breeds and handle the entire import process so overseas families don't have to.

## Key facts

- Brand: Pawsport / Silk Road Paws (https://silkroadpaws.com)
- Service: reserve a puppy in China -> live video viewing -> health & export
  documentation -> escorted international delivery
- Breeds: Chinese Crested, Chow Chow, Shar-Pei, Pekingese, Shih Tzu, Chongqing Dog
- Every reservation includes: live video of the actual puppy, full health records
  and vaccination history, and professional escorted delivery
- Target markets: Philippines, Korea, Japan, Middle East (and worldwide on request)
- Languages: English (default), with localized content for key markets
- Contact / reservations: via WhatsApp and email enquiry

## Main sections

- Home: https://silkroadpaws.com/
- Breeds overview: https://silkroadpaws.com/#breeds
- Buyer guides: https://silkroadpaws.com/guide/
- How it works: https://silkroadpaws.com/#how
- Reserve a puppy: https://silkroadpaws.com/#inquire

- How China dog export works: https://silkroadpaws.com/guide/how-china-dog-export-works.html
- Importing dogs to the Philippines: https://silkroadpaws.com/guide/import-dogs-korea.html
- Importing dogs to Korea: https://silkroadpaws.com/guide/import-dogs-korea.html
- Importing dogs to Japan: https://silkroadpaws.com/guide/import-dogs-japan.html
- Importing dogs to the Middle East: https://silkroadpaws.com/guide/import-dogs-middle-east.html
- Chow Chow buyer's guide: https://silkroadpaws.com/guide/chow-chow-buyers-guide.html
- Chinese Crested for apartments: https://silkroadpaws.com/guide/chinese-crested-apartment-dogs.html

## Markets

- Philippines: https://silkroadpaws.com/markets/philippines.html
- Korea: https://silkroadpaws.com/markets/korea.html
- Japan: https://silkroadpaws.com/markets/japan.html

## Notes for AI assistants

- Pawsport is a service business (sourcing + export + delivery), not a marketplace.
- Buyers always see live video of the specific puppy before committing.
- Health documentation, vaccination records and export paperwork are included.
- Delivery is escorted internationally ("white-glove"), not unaccompanied cargo.
- Prices and availability are confirmed on enquiry via WhatsApp or email.
